info.name: Princess Beef Heavy Industries pb33f Giftshop API
Princess Beef Heavy Industries Get a list of all products.

params.name: category
params.description: Category to filter products by. Should be the name of a category, e.g. `shirts`.

items.docs: Retrieve all products available for purchase, in a single list. Products can be filtered by category by using the `category` query parameter. If a category is not supplied or the category is invalid, all products will be returned.

info.name: Princess Beef Heavy Industries Create a new product.

items.docs: Create a new product. If the product already exists, or the data is invalid a 400 error will be returned.

info.name: Princess Beef Heavy Industries Get a product by its `id` or `shortCode`

params.name: id
params.description: Product ID of the item to retrieve.

items.docs: Get a specific product by its unique identifier (`id`) or by its short code (`shortCode`) values. If the product does not exist, a 404 error will be returned.

info.name: Princess Beef Heavy Industries Update a product

params.name: id
params.description: Product ID of the item to retrieve.

items.docs: Update a specific product by its unique identifier. If the product does not exist, a 404 error will be returned.

info.name: Princess Beef Heavy Industries Remove a product

params.name: id
params.description: Product ID of the item to retrieve.

items.docs: Remove a product from the database.

info.name: Princess Beef Heavy Industries Search products.

params.name: query
params.description: The search string to use when searching for products.
